challenges.name: Export
challenges.keyTakeaway: Volatility fundamentals — process listing, command history recovery, and basic memory dump triage on Windows

challenges.name: TrueSecrets
challenges.keyTakeaway: File extraction from memory — recovering TrueCrypt containers and passphrases using Volatility's specialized plugins

challenges.name: Reminiscent
challenges.keyTakeaway: Phishing attack reconstruction — tracing malicious email attachments through process trees and decoding multi-layer Base64 payloads

challenges.name: Recollection
challenges.keyTakeaway: Comprehensive Windows memory forensics — clipboard analysis, browser history recovery, network connections, and full attack chain reconstruction

challenges.name: RogueOne
challenges.keyTakeaway: C2 detection and process spoofing — identifying malicious processes disguised as legitimate Windows services using malfind and netscan

challenges.name: Mellitus
challenges.keyTakeaway: Full incident response workflow — credential extraction via hashdump, FTP brute-force analysis, and hidden data recovery from process memory

challenges.name: OpTinselTrace-3
challenges.keyTakeaway: Multi-stage attack analysis — tracing malicious shortcuts through VBScript/PowerShell deobfuscation to shellcode and C2 indicators

challenges.name: APTNightmare
challenges.keyTakeaway: Linux memory forensics — building custom Volatility profiles, analyzing bash history, and correlating with PCAP and disk artifacts

challenges.name: Constellation
challenges.keyTakeaway: Memory-extracted URL analysis — combining OSINT with memory artifacts to trace data exfiltration and malicious entity connections

challenges.name: APTNightmare2
challenges.keyTakeaway: Linux rootkit detection — identifying kernel modules that unlist themselves, signal-based process hiding, and advanced evasion techniques

challenges.name: Lockpick3.0
challenges.keyTakeaway: Linux Volatility 3 with custom symbols — building symbol tables for Ubuntu, ransomware incident investigation, and timeline correlation

challenges.name: Reflection
challenges.keyTakeaway: Reflective DLL injection detection — extracting injected DLLs from memory with modified Volatility plugins to bypass anti-forensics
